case_title: JAMES THOMPSON VS. GARRISON PROPERTY AND CASULTY INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF JAMES THOMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GARRISON PROPERTY AND CASULTY INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BECKY TAYLOR. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-17-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JAMES THOMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GARRISON PRPERTY AND CASULTY INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LINDSEY MATESSINO. DEFENDANT WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE SO HE MAY CONSULT WITH AN ATTORNEY RE: THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT STIPULATES TO THE CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GARRISON PROPERTY AND CASULTY INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
